body_html:
ask to talk to castillo,,, governor richardson called
him

--- dkiesq@aol.com wrote:

Ridiculous.

Darren
Sent from my BlackBerry® wireless handheld

-----Original Message-----
From: "Jamey Casner" jcasner@vilawyers.com
Date: Fri, 21 Apr 2006 15:51:20
To:DKIESQ@aol.com, bioimpact@islands.vi,
wfmccomb.eng@attglobal.net,
jcasner@vilawyers.com
Subject: RE: COE

I just spoke with Mr. Cedeno. I tried to reach
Castillo, but was put through to Cedeno. He cried
overworked and overwhelmed for a variety of reasons,
said he could not even look at it for another two to
three weeks and when he does he will contact Amy to
let her know whether the last submission (post
inspection) was accepted as final. He told me to
call again in a couple of weeks to nudge him. I
have not yet received any letter from DPNR advising
re: minor permit. Bill - Have you as primary
contact? ajc
-----Original Message-----
From: DKIESQ@aol.com [mailto:DKIESQ@aol.com]
Sent: Tuesday, March 28, 2006 6:39 PM
To: bioimpact@islands.vi;
wfmccomb.eng@attglobal.net; jcasner@vilawyers.com
Subject: Re: COE

Jamie,

Better for you to call. I will just be an
outsider. Please call as soon as you can and let me
know what happens. Thanks.

Darren
